params.TriggerDescription: Whenever CARDNAME becomes tapped, create a 1/1 red Human creature token if this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn. If it's the second time, create a 1/1 blue Spirit creature token with flying. If it's the third time, create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying.
Whenever you cast a spell that has convoke, untap CARDNAME.
